sum: Components to enable use of straigth swords for Clerics and Light Crossbows for Clerics and Mages.
no: Components to enable use of straigth swords for Clerics and Light Crossbows for Clerics and Mages.

co.n: Universal ammunition - equippable by all classes
One-handed light crossbows - usable with shields
Enable Mages and all their kits to use and become proficient with light crossbows

Enable Clerics and related kits to use and become proficient with light crossbows and darts -
    Cleric multi classes may gain access to heavy crossbows

Enable Clerics and related kits to use and become proficient with light crossbows, darts and straight blades -
    Cleric multi classes may gain access to heavy crossbows, bastard and two-handed swords
